social_snippets.text: 🦋 NEW: Mystery of the Missing Monarch Butterflies reading passage! Perfect for 6th grade science integration. Students love this real-world environmental mystery! #ReadingComprehension #6thGrade #ScienceReading #MonarchButterflies

📚 Help your 6th graders develop critical reading skills with this fascinating passage about monarch butterfly migration! Aligned with RI.6.1 and perfect for cross-curricular science connections. Students will be captivated by this environmental mystery!
